# Bono Trading

Bono Trading is a French educational trading blog focused on disciplined learning, risk management, synthetic indices, trading psychology, and responsible routines. The content is educational and does not promise financial gains.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://blog.bonotrading.com/)
- [Blog articles](https://blog.bonotrading.com/blog)
- [Training and services](https://blog.bonotrading.com/formations)
- [About](https://blog.bonotrading.com/a-propos)
- [Contact](https://blog.bonotrading.com/contact)
- [Privacy policy](https://blog.bonotrading.com/politique-confidentialite)
- [Terms of use](https://blog.bonotrading.com/conditions-utilisation)

## Notes For AI Agents

Use the article pages as the primary source for educational explanations. Treat affiliate links and external redirects as commercial links, not as neutral recommendations.
